perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a centered shot of a large television screen displaying a futuristic wheelchair basketball video game. (2) The camera tilts down to reveal a player's hands, adorned with wooden bead bracelets and a yellow-banded smartwatch, moving two small handheld controllers (Joy-Cons) rhythmically on a black desk mat. (3) The camera alternates between the screen and the player, who is wearing a grey hoodie and a checkered flat cap, showing his back as he interacts with the game in an event-like setting with a red background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy Japanese commentary and ambient crowd chatter begin immediately, creating a lively atmosphere. (2) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music enters, maintaining a constant tempo. (3) Loud vocal outbursts in both Japanese and English, such as "Nice!", "Go back!", and "Cool!", are heard from the surrounding crowd as the game progresses.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: "任天堂Switch2輪椅籃球🏀實際玩" (Nintendo Switch 2 Wheelchair Basketball Actual Gameplay) in white and black variety-style font at the bottom of the screen. (2) Functional Text: On-screen game UI displays "Cool", "Nice", "02:04", "2P", and Japanese instructions for "Pass" and "Brake". (3) Emotional Tone: The text reflects excitement and highlights the specific hardware and game title.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main player visible; other voices are heard but people are not clearly shown on screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male wearing a checkered flat cap, a grey zip-up hoodie, multiple beaded bracelets on both wrists, and a smartwatch with a bright yellow band.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A vibrant red wall with built-in cabinetry and a sleek grey table with a black gaming mat. In the distance, a high ceiling with industrial lighting and rigging is visible.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a first-person perspective demonstration of a new video game or hardware feature, specifically highlighting a wheelchair basketball game on what is claimed to be 'Nintendo Switch 2'. The focus is on showing the correlation between the player's physical movements with the controllers and the actions on the screen to generate excitement and proof of functionality.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presence of the Nintendo brand, the explicit mention of 'Switch 2' in the hook text, and the professional event setting.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Close-up hand focus with specific fashion accessories (beaded bracelets).
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets gaming enthusiasts looking for leaks or previews of upcoming hardware. The enthusiastic Japanese crowd adds a sense of 'being there' at a major gaming event.
